title: Miracles of Jesus
description: Learn about the great miracles performed by Lord Jesus in this quiz.

questions.question: In which town did Jesus perform His first miracle, turning water into wine?
questions.explanation: John 2:11 - What Jesus did here in Cana of Galilee was the first of the signs through which he revealed his glory.

questions.question: How many men did Jesus feed with five loaves of bread and two fish?
questions.explanation: Matthew 14:21 - The number of those who ate was about five thousand men, besides women and children.

questions.question: What did Jesus rebuke to calm the storm after His disciples woke Him?
questions.explanation: Mark 4:39 - He got up, rebuked the wind and said to the waves, 'Quiet! Be still!' Then the wind died down and it was completely calm.

questions.question: On which sea did Jesus walk to reach His disciples?
questions.explanation: Matthew 14:25 - Shortly before dawn Jesus went out to them, walking on the lake.

questions.question: What was the name of the blind man Jesus healed while leaving Jericho?
questions.explanation: Mark 10:46 - Blind Bartimaeus, the son of Timaeus, was sitting by the roadside begging.

questions.question: Who did Jesus raise from the tomb four days after he had died?
questions.explanation: John 11:43 - Jesus called in a loud voice, 'Lazarus, come out!' The dead man came out.

questions.question: What did the woman who had been subject to bleeding for twelve years touch to be healed by Jesus?
questions.explanation: Luke 8:44 - She came up behind him and touched the edge of his cloak, and immediately her bleeding stopped.

questions.question: Whose servant did Jesus heal simply by speaking a word without going to their house?
questions.explanation: Matthew 8:8 - The centurion replied, 'Lord, I do not deserve to have you come under my roof. But just say the word, and my servant will be healed.'

questions.question: How did the four men bring the paralytic to Jesus when the crowd was too large?
questions.opt2: By removing the roof and lowering him
questions.correct: By removing the roof and lowering him
questions.explanation: Mark 2:4 - Since they could not get him to Jesus because of the crowd, they made an opening in the roof above Jesus and lowered the mat the paralyzed man was lying on.

questions.question: What did Peter catch when he let down the nets at Jesus' word after catching nothing all night?
questions.explanation: Luke 5:6 - When they had done so, they caught such a large number of fish that their nets began to break.

questions.question: How many of the ten lepers healed by Jesus came back to thank Him?
questions.explanation: Luke 17:15 - One of them, when he saw he was healed, came back, praising God in a loud voice.

questions.question: What did Jesus say to raise Jairus' daughter from the dead?
questions.explanation: Mark 5:41 - He took her by the hand and said to her, 'Talitha koum' (which means 'Little girl, I say to you, get up!').

questions.question: Whom did Jesus heal in the synagogue on the Sabbath?
questions.opt2: A man with a shriveled hand
questions.correct: A man with a shriveled hand
questions.explanation: Matthew 12:13 - Then he said to the man, 'Stretch out your hand.' So he stretched it out and it was completely restored.

questions.question: Into what did the demons beg Jesus to let them enter after leaving the man in the region of the Gerasenes?
questions.explanation: Mark 5:12 - The demons begged Jesus, 'Send us among the pigs; allow us to go into them.'

questions.question: What did Peter find in the mouth of the first fish he caught to pay the temple tax?
questions.explanation: Matthew 17:27 - 'Take the first fish you catch; open its mouth and you will find a four-drachma coin.'
